overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a snowy mountain valley at night under the aurora borealis. The camera follows a trail through deep snow between rocky mountain slopes, passing a wooden trail marker, with the green-blue northern lights illuminating the sky ahead. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine with cinematic quality.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley trail between rocky slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the snow-covered trail between mountain slopes, following existing footprints

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain slope covered in snow, forming the left boundary of the valley
snow-covered rocky ridge line on the right side of the path
green and blue northern lights glowing in the night sky above the mountain peak
trail through deep snow with visible footprints leading forward
dark rocks partially buried in snow on the left slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a narrow snowy mountain valley at night. The aurora borealis glows green-blue in the sky ahead, casting faint light on the snow-covered path. Rocky slopes flank both sides of the trail, with scattered boulders visible on the left as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching wooden marker post

events.description: wooden trail marker with red markings becomes visible in the center of the path ahead
camera passes the wooden trail marker on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing up the trail, approaching and passing the wooden trail marker while maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: vertical wooden post with red and white painted bands marking the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wooden trail marker standing in the middle of the snowy path. As the camera continues forward, it passes the marker on the left side. The rocky mountain slopes draw closer on both sides, and the aurora remains visible ahead, illuminating the narrowing valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain pass under aurora with blowing snow

events.description: valley opens into wider mountain pass with expansive view of aurora ahead
blowing snow and mist become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the open valley toward the aurora-lit sky, with snow beginning to blow across the path

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peak silhouetted against the bright aurora
wind-driven snow particles drifting across the trail ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the trail marker, the scene opens into a wider mountain pass with the aurora borealis dominating the sky directly ahead. The terrain becomes more exposed with distant peaks visible against the glowing lights. Wind begins to blow snow across the path as the camera continues its steady ascent into the misty valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow, snowy mountain valley that gradually opens into a vast, wind-swept pass under a glowing sky. It begins by moving along a snow-covered path flanked by rocky slopes and scattered boulders, with the green-blue aurora borealis casting a faint light from the distance. As the camera advances, it passes a wooden trail marker on the left while the surrounding mountain walls draw closer, momentarily tightening the perspective. The scene then expands into a wider mountain pass where the aurora dominates the horizon and distant peaks emerge against the shimmering lights. Finally, the terrain becomes more exposed as wind-blown snow sweeps across the path during a steady ascent into the misty valley.
